source_expectation.quality_estimate_target: 8/10 or better intake for static room dressing

refinement_checklist: Run raw asset audit and capture dimensions.
Review world origin, pivot intent, and floor contact.
Capture a front preview render for room-art review.
Record room focus preset and target Unity room path.
validation_checklist: Manual gate notes cover pivot or placement review when automation is insufficient.
manual_gate_notes: Current implementation does not include a generic room-item pivot normalization script in root tools.
Unity now has room-item handoff registry intake, but live prefab hookup and broader room interaction mapping remain follow-up work.
